verdict_basis: Os cinco criterios de saida P2 passam no snapshot corrente. Os cinco defeitos solicitados foram retestados como resolvidos, os contratos de papeis, handoff, comandos, aliases, namespace e experimentos sao consistentes, o manifesto ancora exatamente os quatro artefatos oficiais, os 100 prompts foram reproduzidos diretamente no repositorio-fonte sem divergencia e a fonte permanece limpa no commit de baseline.

prior_defect_retests.topic: unknown maturity must not be coerced to nascente
prior_defect_retests.basis: unknown is a canonical maturity value; the decision table emits unknown for missing required dimensions and emits nascente only when all required classification dimensions are evidenced.

prior_defect_retests.topic: tactic hard cap must use route_node consistently
prior_defect_retests.basis: selection_unit is route_node_id and the reject rule applies when more than two tactics are requested for one specialist route_node.

prior_defect_retests.topic: negative metric domains must be deterministic
prior_defect_retests.basis: The ratio classifier is restricted to a non-negative domain; unsupported negative or zero-denominator inputs require a predeclared transformation or direct threshold, otherwise the deterministic result is TESTAR without calculating performance_index.

prior_defect_retests.topic: UQ-002 must be resolved rather than unresolved
prior_defect_retests.basis: UQ-002 appears in resolved_questions and is absent from unresolved_questions and lead_resolutions.

prior_defect_retests.topic: Ampliar channel-role classification must differ from Refinar performance classification
prior_defect_retests.basis: Ampliar emits channel_role_and_feasibility_classification_with_evidence and explicitly excludes performance_action_classification, which belongs exclusively to Refinar.

source_index_replay.method: Every SOURCE_INDEX canonical prompt was read directly from PROJECT.source.repo; no control-workspace fallback was permitted.

exit_criteria.criterion: Existe uma terminologia e uma versao canonica unicas, independentes do host.
exit_criteria.basis: The integrated contracts use product version 2.0.0, one five-role vocabulary and the host-neutral .loop-marketing/ state namespace.

exit_criteria.criterion: Planner e quatro pilares possuem owner, entradas, saidas, nao-objetivos e fronteiras sem sobreposicao decisoria.
exit_criteria.basis: All five roles have nonempty owns, required_inputs, outputs and does_not_own contracts; decision ownership is canonical and the Ampliar versus Refinar classification boundary is explicit.

exit_criteria.criterion: Roteamento, ordem, paralelismo, handoff, thresholds e conflitos possuem regras completas e deterministicas.
exit_criteria.basis: Routing covers bottleneck precedence, safe sequencing and parallelism, a matching 22-field handoff, 0/1/2/reject tactic cardinality per route_node, complete non-negative benchmark intervals, invalid-domain TESTAR behavior, maturity unknown and evidence-gated experiment transitions.

exit_criteria.criterion: Compatibilidade com projetos e comandos anteriores possui politica explicita de aliases e migracao.
exit_criteria.basis: Six exact command IDs, canonical invocations and legacy alias lists are defined; legacy discovery is read-only and migration, conflict and rollback behavior are explicit.

exit_criteria.criterion: Todos os artefatos passam validacao cruzada e nenhuma alteracao foi feita nos 100 prompts canonicos.
exit_criteria.basis: Both P2 validator stages and context_guard passed; the four-artifact manifest is current; direct source replay found exactly 100 unique paths, zero missing or mismatched hashes and the expected aggregate; source HEAD and clean status match baseline.

command_results.command: independent current-snapshot contract and direct SOURCE_INDEX replay
